title: NA-Non ULIP
word_text:
Bought a term plan? Don’t Forget to Renew it Timely
Meta description: It is important to renew your term insurance plan on time before it expires. The benefits you get to enjoy by doing so are aplenty.
Keywords: term insurance renewal, term insurance, term life insurance, what is term plan
A term life insurance plan can help you protect your family financially even when you’re no longer there to support them. But what is a term plan? It is basically a contract between an individual and an insurance company, where the insurer provides the individual with a life cover in exchange for periodic payments known as premiums. And in the event of death of the insured individual, the insurer will pay a predetermined sum of money to their nominees as a death benefit. This death benefit payout can be used by the nominee to further their life goals.
That said, you don’t get the coverage from a term plan indefinitely. In fact, such an insurance plan is valid only for a certain specific period of time. That’s why it is known as a ‘term’ insurance plan.
By renewing your term plan on a timely basis, you can continue to provide protection to your family without any break. Let’s take a look at why timely renewal is necessary for a term insurance plan.
When does my Term Insurance end?
Now that you know the answer to the question, ‘what is a term plan?’, let’s take a look at when it ceases to exist.
As you’re already aware, a term life insurance plan is only valid for a certain period of time. This tenure of the plan is chosen by the policyholder at the time of purchase of the plan. And the validity of the term insurance is dependent on the tenure chosen.
For instance, let’s say that you decide to purchase a term plan. At the time of purchase, you decide to go with a tenure of 20 years. Going by this, your term insurance will automatically come to an end 20 years from now.
Why is it important to renew your Term Insurance?
And if something were to happen to you after your term insurance plan ends, your nominees won’t receive any death benefit payout, which can leave them financially unprotected. .
Timely term insurance renewal ensures that your plan remains active and that you continue to enjoy all the benefits listed under it. That’s not all. You can also choose to renew your term insurance plan at the end of overall tenure for the same tenure that you chose initially at the time of purchase as well depending on the terms and conditions of the plan and insurance company guidelines. For instance, if your initial tenure was 20 years, at the end of the period, you can choose to renew your term insurance for a further 20 years, this is not applicable for every company and every term insurance plan.
